[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000001 1
1 000100000 1
2 000000000 a
3 010000000 1
4 000011000 2
5 000000000 a
6 001111101 6
7 011111101 7

01 10 001111101 6 match 6
12 21 001000001 2
23 32 000000001 1 match 0
34 43 000100000 1 match 1
45 54 000000000 a match 2 5
56 65 010000000 1 match 3
67 76 000011000 2 match 4
70 07 001011000 3

02 20 001000001 2
13 31 000101001 3
24 42 000000010 1
35 53 000000001 1 match 0
46 64 000110100 3
57 75 000000000 a match 2 5
60 06 000111100 4
71 17 001011000 3

14 41 000110100 3
25 52 000000001 1 match 0
36 63 000101000 2
47 74 000010000 1
50 05 000000001 1 match 0
61 16 010111100 5
72 27 001000000 1

04 40 000110100 3
15 51 010000001 2
26 62 000000000 a match 2 5
37 73 000001000 1
